title: UltralightFabric
body: # UltralightFabric UltralightFabric is an implementation of Ultralight for Fabric. This implementation was not a work of my own but of a project called [LiquidBounce](https://github.com/CCBlueX/LiquidBounce) which is unfortunately a hacked client. It has been adapted into a library that everyone is free to use. ## Developing **Developers:** For information about using UltralightFabric in your own mod, [consult the wiki](https://github.com/isXander/UltralightFabric/wiki/Using-UltralightFabric) ## Requirements
